rule: Every legacy test ID must carry a disposition. 'migrate'/'rewrite' require a Replacement Test ID before M6 may delete the original.

dispositions.migrate: capability survives; behaviour must exist in a new-module test
dispositions.rewrite: capability survives; test must be rebuilt against new ports
dispositions.delete: domain concept removed with the legacy engine
